description: AcmeEnterprise Reference UNS Template v2 — 6 Business Groups (WheelforgeBV/automotive, Pillcraft_Co/pharma, Frostbite_Fantasy_Foods/frozen food, Vatworks_Chems/specialty chemicals, Atomcraft_Energy/nuclear, Cleanflow_Water/water-wastewater), 18 operational sites, ISA-95 aligned physical hierarchy, policy-compliant functional branches per Cosun UNS Topic Policy v1.2.

tree.name: acme-enterprise
tree.description: AcmeEnterprise — Reference UNS Template v2. Six business groups: WheelforgeBV (automotive), Pillcraft_Co (pharma), Frostbite_Fantasy_Foods (frozen food), Vatworks_Chems (specialty chemicals), Atomcraft_Energy (nuclear), Cleanflow_Water (water/wastewater). 12 → 18 manufacturing and operational sites. Structured per Cosun UNS Topic Policy v1.2.
